When the time is $$12:17 \rm{P.M.}$$ or $$\rm{A.M.}$$, the clock will show $$12:17 \rm{P.M.}$$ or $$\rm{A.M.}$$ respectively. How many minutes later will Archie\textquotesingle s clock show digits again in consecutive order?
(A) 507$$ minutes
(B) 458$$ minutes
(C) 467$$ minutes
(D) 407$$ minutes
(E) None of the above
